Adds an agent to the simulation.

Adds an edge to the graph.
addEdgeBtn - Variable in class fr.projet.ui.ToolBox
 
addNode(Node) - Method in class fr.projet.model.Graph
Adds a node to the graph if it is not already present.
addNodeBtn - Variable in class fr.projet.ui.ToolBox
 
Agent - Class in fr.projet.model
Represents an agent moving through the graph.
Agent(int, double, Node, Node) - Constructor for class fr.projet.model.Agent
Creates a new agent.
ARRIVED - Enum constant in enum class fr.projet.model.State
Agent has reached its destination
ASTAR - Enum constant in enum class fr.projet.pathfinding.PathFinderType

Implementation of the A* pathfinding algorithm.

attachView(GraphView) - Method in class fr.projet.controller.GraphController
Attaches the view to the controller.

B

buildEngine(Graph, Node, Node) - Static method in class fr.projet.controller.SimulationController
Builds and returns a configured simulation engine.
buildGraph() - Static method in class fr.projet.controller.GraphController
Builds and returns a configured graph with nodes and edges.

clearSelection() - Method in class fr.projet.view.GraphView
Clears the current node selection.
create(PathFinderType, Graph) - Static method in class fr.projet.pathfinding.PathFinderFactory
 
createAgentAtSelectedNode(SimulationEngine) - Method in class fr.projet.controller.GraphController
Creates an agent on the currently selected node and assigns a destination and speed.

D

deleteBtn - Variable in class fr.projet.ui.ToolBox
 
DIJKSTRA - Enum constant in enum class fr.projet.pathfinding.PathFinderType
 
DijkstraPathFinder - Class in fr.projet.pathfinding
Implementation of the PathFinder interface using Dijkstra's algorithm.
DijkstraPathFinder(Graph) - Constructor for class fr.projet.pathfinding.DijkstraPathFinder
Creates a new Dijkstra path finder operating on a graph.
disableDeleteMode() - Method in class fr.projet.controller.GraphController
Disables deletion mode and restores the normal cursor.
disableEdgeCreationMode() - Method in class fr.projet.controller.GraphController
Disables edge creation mode and restores the normal cursor.
disableNodeCreationMode() - Method in class fr.projet.controller.GraphController
Disables node creation mode and restores the normal cursor.

E

Edge - Class in fr.projet.model
Represents a directed or undirected connection between two nodes in the graph.
Edge(Node, Node, double) - Constructor for class fr.projet.model.Edge
Creates a new edge between two nodes.
enableDeleteMode() - Method in class fr.projet.controller.GraphController
Enables deletion mode.
enableEdgeCreationMode() - Method in class fr.projet.controller.GraphController
Enables edge creation mode.
enableNodeCreationMode() - Method in class fr.projet.controller.GraphController
Enables node creation mode.
equals(Object) - Method in class fr.projet.model.Agent
Checks equality based on agent id.
equals(Object) - Method in class fr.projet.model.Node
 

F

FastAgent - Class in fr.projet.model
A faster variant of the standard Agent.
FastAgent(int, double, Node, Node) - Constructor for class fr.projet.model.FastAgent
Alternative constructor with custom speed multiplier.
FastAgent(int, Node, Node) - Constructor for class fr.projet.model.FastAgent
Creates a fast agent with increased speed.
findPath(Node, Node) - Method in class fr.projet.pathfinding.AStarPathFinder
 
findPath(Node, Node) - Method in class fr.projet.pathfinding.DijkstraPathFinder
Computes the shortest path between two nodes using Dijkstra's algorithm.
findPath(Node, Node) - Method in interface fr.projet.pathfinding.PathFinder
Computes a path between two nodes.

G

getAgents() - Method in class fr.projet.model.Edge
Returns the list of agents currently on this edge.
getAgents() - Method in class fr.projet.model.Node
Returns the list of agents currently on this node.
getAgents() - Method in class fr.projet.simulation.SimulationEngine
Returns all agents currently managed by the simulation.
getAllNodes() - Method in class fr.projet.model.Graph
Returns all nodes currently contained in the graph.
getCapacity() - Method in class fr.projet.model.Edge
Returns the maximum capacity of the edge.
getCurrentPath() - Method in class fr.projet.model.Agent
Returns the current path followed by the agent.
getCurrentPosition() - Method in class fr.projet.model.Agent
Returns the current position node of the agent.
getCurrentTick() - Method in class fr.projet.simulation.SimulationEngine
Returns the current simulation tick.
getDestination() - Method in class fr.projet.model.Agent
Returns the destination node of the agent.
getDestination() - Method in class fr.projet.model.Edge
Returns the destination node of the edge.
getDistance() - Method in class fr.projet.model.Edge
Returns the distance of the edge.
getEdges(Node) - Method in class fr.projet.model.Graph
Returns all outgoing edges of a node.
getGraph() - Method in class fr.projet.simulation.SimulationEngine
Returns the graph associated with the simulation.
getId() - Method in class fr.projet.model.Agent
Returns the unique identifier of the agent.
getId() - Method in class fr.projet.model.Node
Returns the node identifier.
getInitialPosition() - Method in class fr.projet.model.Agent
Returns the initial position of the agent.
getMaxCapacity() - Method in class fr.projet.model.Node
Returns the maximum capacity of the node.
getNeighbors(Node) - Method in class fr.projet.model.Graph
Returns all neighboring nodes reachable from a given node.
getNextNode() - Method in class fr.projet.model.Agent
Returns the next node the agent is heading to.
getNodeById(int) - Method in class fr.projet.model.Graph
 
getPathIndex() - Method in class fr.projet.model.Agent
Returns the current index in the path.
getProgressOnEdge() - Method in class fr.projet.model.Agent
Returns the progress of the agent on the current edge.
getSource() - Method in class fr.projet.model.Edge
Returns the source node of the edge.
getSpeed() - Method in class fr.projet.model.Agent
Returns the maximum movement speed of the agent.
getState() - Method in class fr.projet.model.Agent
Returns the current state of the agent.
getX() - Method in class fr.projet.model.Node
Returns the X coordinate of the node.
getY() - Method in class fr.projet.model.Node
Returns the Y coordinate of the node.
Graph - Class in fr.projet.model
Represents a graph using an adjacency list structure.
Graph() - Constructor for class fr.projet.model.Graph
Creates an empty graph.
GraphController - Class in fr.projet.controller
Controller responsible for building and configuring the graph.
GraphController(Graph) - Constructor for class fr.projet.controller.GraphController
Creates a controller bound to a graph instance.
GraphView - Class in fr.projet.view
 
GraphView() - Constructor for class fr.projet.view.GraphView
Creates the view and prepares background click handling.

H

handleBackgroundClick(Point2D) - Method in class fr.projet.controller.GraphController
Handles a click on the empty drawing area and creates a new node.
handleEdgeClicked(Edge) - Method in class fr.projet.controller.GraphController
Handles a click on an edge and removes it when deletion mode is active.
handleNodeClicked(Node) - Method in class fr.projet.controller.GraphController
Handles a node click.
hasConnection(Node, Node) - Method in class fr.projet.model.Graph
Checks whether two nodes are already connected in either direction.
hasEdge(Node, Node) - Method in class fr.projet.model.Graph
Checks whether a directed edge already exists from source to destination.
hashCode() - Method in class fr.projet.model.Agent
Returns a hash code based on agent id.
hashCode() - Method in class fr.projet.model.Node
 
helpBtn - Variable in class fr.projet.ui.ToolBox
 
HelpDialog - Class in fr.projet.ui
Displays a simple help window explaining how to use the simulation.
HelpDialog() - Constructor for class fr.projet.ui.HelpDialog

isBlocked() - Method in class fr.projet.model.Node
Returns whether the node is blocked.
isOriented() - Method in class fr.projet.model.Edge

MainApp - Class in fr.projet.ui

moveAgent(Agent) - Method in class fr.projet.simulation.SimulationEngine
Moves the agent along the shortest path toward its destination.
MOVING - Enum constant in enum class fr.projet.model.State
Agent is moving along an edge

Node - Class in fr.projet.model
Represents a node in the graph.

P

PathFinder - Interface in fr.projet.pathfinding
Defines a pathfinding strategy capable of computing a path between two nodes.
PathFinderFactory - Class in fr.projet.pathfinding
Factory used to create PathFinder implementations.
PathFinderFactory() - Constructor for class fr.projet.pathfinding.PathFinderFactory
 
PathFinderType - Enum Class in fr.projet.pathfinding
Types of pathfinding algorithms available in the simulation.
pauseBtn - Variable in class fr.projet.ui.SimulationBar
 
ProjetGenieLogiciel - module ProjetGenieLogiciel
Main module of the graph-based agent simulation project.

R

removeAgent(Agent) - Method in class fr.projet.simulation.SimulationEngine
Removes an agent from the simulation entirely.
removeEdge(Node, Node) - Method in class fr.projet.model.Graph
Removes an edge between the source node and the destination node.
removeNode(Node) - Method in class fr.projet.model.Graph
Removes a node from the graph and deletes all edges connected to it.
renderAgents(List<Agent>) - Method in class fr.projet.view.GraphView
 
renderGraph(Graph) - Method in class fr.projet.view.GraphView
Renders the graph by drawing nodes, edges, and labels.
reset() - Method in class fr.projet.simulation.SimulationEngine
Resets the simulation to its initial state.
resetBtn - Variable in class fr.projet.ui.SimulationBar
 

S

Sets the list of agents currently on this edge.

Sets the list of agents currently on this node.

Sets the handler used when the user clicks on empty space.

Sets whether the node is blocked.

Sets the maximum capacity of the edge.

Sets the destination node of the agent.

Sets the distance of the edge.

Sets the callback called when an edge is clicked.

Sets the cursor used while an editing mode is active.
setId(int) - Method in class fr.projet.model.Agent
Sets the unique identifier of the agent.
setMaxCapacity(int) - Method in class fr.projet.model.Node
Sets the maximum capacity of the node.
setNextNode(Node) - Method in class fr.projet.model.Agent
Sets the next node the agent is heading to.
setNodeClickHandler(Consumer<Node>) - Method in class fr.projet.view.GraphView
Sets the callback called when a node is clicked.
setNodeCreationMode(boolean) - Method in class fr.projet.view.GraphView
Sets the cursor used while the node creation mode is active.
setOriented(boolean) - Method in class fr.projet.model.Edge
Sets whether the edge is directed.
setPathIndex(int) - Method in class fr.projet.model.Agent
Updates the index in the current path.
setProgressOnEdge(double) - Method in class fr.projet.model.Agent
Sets the progress of the agent on the current edge.

Updates the selected node and refreshes the visual highlight.
setSource(Node) - Method in class fr.projet.model.Edge
Sets the source node of the edge.
setSpeed(double) - Method in class fr.projet.model.Agent
Sets the maximum movement speed of the agent.
setState(State) - Method in class fr.projet.model.Agent
Sets the current state of the agent.
setX(Double) - Method in class fr.projet.model.Node
Sets the X coordinate of the node.
setY(Double) - Method in class fr.projet.model.Node
Sets the Y coordinate of the node.
